service_overview.service_description: A self-service currency exchange kiosk that allows customers to exchange foreign banknotes quickly and conveniently.
service_overview.service_purpose: To provide fast, convenient, and transparent foreign currency exchange for visitors and travelers.
service_overview.target_users: Foreign visitors and travelers with foreign currency banknotes

basic_flow.flow_summary: Customers follow the instructions shown on the kiosk screen step by step.

eligibility.eligible_users: Foreign nationals with a valid foreign passport
eligibility.id_required: Valid passport (must be physically present for scanning)

currencies_and_denominations.current_banknote_policy: Only current valid banknotes are accepted.
currencies_and_denominations.damaged_banknote_policy: Damaged banknotes such as folded or torn notes are not accepted.
currencies_and_denominations.unsupported_note_policy: If a note is not accepted, please check whether it is a supported denomination and currency.

basic_checks: Ensure the banknote is a currently valid and accepted denomination.
Insert the note in the correct orientation as shown on screen.
Insert one note at a time.
banknote_input.multi_note_input: Multiple notes must be inserted one at a time, not together.
banknote_input.partial_insertion_guidance: If the machine does not accept the note, do not force it in. Remove the note and retry.

passport_scan_auth.passport_required: A valid physical passport is required. Digital copies or photos of a passport cannot be used.
basic_scan_checks: Open the passport to the photo/information page.
Place the passport flat on the scanner window.
Ensure there is no light reflection or shadow on the page.
Keep the passport still during scanning.
passport_scan_auth.additional_scan_guidance: If passport scanning fails, retry after checking the passport page condition and scan alignment.
passport_scan_auth.retry_policy: If the scan fails, remove the passport and try again. If it continues to fail after multiple attempts, contact support.

exchange_rate.rate_basis: The exchange rate follows the representative exchange rate of a major bank in Korea.
exchange_rate.rate_reference_time: The most recently posted bank rate

amount_and_rounding.rounding_rule: Amounts below KRW 1,000 are rounded down.
amount_and_rounding.general_amount_rules: The final amount is calculated based on the posted exchange rate and the rounding rule below KRW 1,000.
possible_reasons_for_difference: Exchange rate applied at the time of transaction
Rounding down of sub-1,000 KRW amounts

qr_and_access.alternative_access_method: If the QR code does not work, you may access the service page directly using the URL shown on the kiosk.
basic_qr_checks: Ensure your camera is focused on the QR code.
Keep a stable distance of 10–30 cm from the QR code.
Try refreshing or reopening your camera app.

transaction_refund_settlement.refund_policy: Refund eligibility and processing depend on the circumstances of the transaction. Please contact support with your case details.
transaction_refund_settlement.settlement_timing: Transaction settlement timing varies and is not confirmed by the chatbot.

handover_required_info.support_message: Please contact our support team with the details of your issue.
